text: Sasur ji ke guzarne ke baad property ko lekar bade bhai se rishta bilkul toot gaya hai, aur ab Saas ne announce kiya ki unke maike wale yahan permanently rahenge. Mera mann kar raha hai ki main khul kar virodh karun kyunki ghar mein pehle hi jagah nahi hai, par parivaar ki 'izzat' bachane ke liye main chup-chap unke liye kamra khali kar rahi hoon. Main nahi chahti ki log kahein ki bahu ne aate hi kalesh shuru kar diya, isliye bas unki haan mein haan mila rahi hoon.

Inheritance dispute ki wajah se pehle hi ghar mitti mein mil gaya hai aur ab pati ke chacha-chachi permanently hamare sath shift ho rahe hain. Career gap ki wajah se mujhme pehle hi confidence nahi hai, isliye main Saas ke samman ke liye unhe mana nahi kar sakti. Main bas sabki khatir-daari mein lag gayi hoon taaki rishtedar ye na kahein ki hamari bahu sanskari nahi hai.

Ghar mein property ko lekar sibling estrangement itni badh gayi hai ki mahool hamesha bhari rehta hai, aur ab in-laws ke aane se meri privacy bilkul khatam ho gayi. Mera dimaag fat raha hai par parivaar ki shanti ke liye main chup-chap Saas ki har baat sunti hoon kyunki hamare yahan बड़ों ke aage bolna bad-tameezi mani jati hai. Main apni takleef kisi ko nahi bata rahi taaki ghar ki 'izzat' bazaar mein na uchle.

Dadi ke marne ke baad jaydad ka jhagda itna badha ki ab Saas ne sulah ke liye apne bhai ko permanently bulaya hai. Mujh par bacchon ki padhai aur ghar ke kamo ka pehle hi bojh hai par main unhe jane ko nahi bol sakti kyunki rishto ka lihaz rakhna meri duty hai. Main bas mann hi mann ghut rahi hoon par bahar se sabki seva kar rahi hoon taaki parivar ki unity bani rahe.

Joint family mein property dispute ke beech in-laws ka permanent aana mere liye ek naya stress hai, par 'log kya kahenge' ke darr se main chup hoon. Main apni lost identity dhoondna chahti hoon par ab inki seva karna hi mera naya farz ban gaya hai. Pati ki khushi aur ghar ki 'izzat' ke liye main apni har khwahish kurban kar rahi hoon taaki parivar mein aur darar na aaye.
